template.title: Choose functional accessory type
template.description: Select the type of virtual accessory to create.

slots.title: Assign entities to slots
slots.description: Assign your entities to each slot. Required slots must be filled.

data.action: Lock actuator (switch/lock that moves the bolt)

error.required_slots: Please assign an entity to every required slot.

bridge.title: HomeKit Bridge & ghosting
bridge.description: Select the HomeKit Bridge that will expose this accessory. Enable automated ghosting to hide the raw slot entities from this bridge.

name.title: Name your accessory
name.description: Give this virtual accessory a friendly name.

error.cannot_update_bridge: Could not update HomeKit Bridge filter. Check logs.

abort.no_bridges: No HomeKit Bridge found. Add a HomeKit integration first.

init.title: Edit HomeKit Architect entry
init.description: Change slot assignments, bridge, or ghosting.
